tool_args.label: Farebox Revenue Variance Explanation
tool_args.raw_text: Farebox Revenues were $7.6 million favorable to the Forecast due to increased non-commutation ridership and higher average yield per passenger partially offset by lower commutation ridership.

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenues were $7.6 million favorable to the Forecast due to increased non-commutation ridership and higher average yield per passenger partially offset by lower commutation ridership.
payload.description: Explanation for farebox revenue variance through September 2025

tool_args.label: Other Operating Revenue Variance Explanation
tool_args.raw_text: Other Operating Revenues were $9.9 million favorable to the Forecast reflecting higher advertising, interest, net GCT retail and station revenues as well as a FEMA reimbursement for a 2023 flooding incident.

payload.claim_text: Other Operating Revenues were $9.9 million favorable to the Forecast reflecting higher advertising, interest, net GCT retail and station revenues as well as a FEMA reimbursement for a 2023 flooding incident.
payload.description: Explanation for other operating revenue variance through September 2025

tool_args.label: Labor Expense Variance Detail
tool_args.raw_text: Labor Expenses: $1.7 million favorable to the Forecast. [...] Payroll was $0.6 million favorable [...] Overtime was $1.6 million unfavorable [...] Health & Welfare was $3.7 million favorable [...] OPEB Current Payment was $0.8 million unfavorable [...] Pensions were $4.7 million favorable [...] Other Fringe Benefits were $2.5 million unfavorable [...] Reimbursable Overhead was $2.3 million unfavorable

payload.claim_text: Labor Expenses: $1.7 million favorable to the Forecast. Payroll $0.6M favorable due to lower OTE Retro-Wage accruals and decreased hiring activity partially offset by reduced capital project activity. Overtime $1.6M unfavorable due to higher scheduled service partially offset by lower weather emergencies. Health & Welfare $3.7M favorable due to lower rates. OPEB Current Payment $0.8M unfavorable due to higher number of retirees. Pensions $4.7M favorable due to lower rates. Other Fringe Benefits $2.5M unfavorable reflecting timing of RRT and contractual lump-sum payments. Reimbursable Overhead $2.3M unfavorable due to scheduling and timing changes in capital project expenditures.
payload.description: Detail of labor expense variances through September 2025

tool_args.label: Non-Labor Expense Variance Detail
tool_args.raw_text: Non-Labor Expenses: $9.2 million favorable to the Forecast. [...] Electric Power was $2.9 million unfavorable [...] Fuel was $0.3 million favorable [...] Claims were $3.2 million unfavorable [...] Professional Service Contracts were $8.9 million favorable [...] Materials and Supplies were $5.8 million favorable

payload.claim_text: Non-Labor Expenses: $9.2 million favorable to the Forecast. Electric Power $2.9M unfavorable due to higher rates. Fuel $0.3M favorable due to lower usage partially offset by higher rates. Insurance flat to Forecast. Claims $3.2M unfavorable due to higher passenger claim provision. Maintenance and Other Operating Contracts $1.8M unfavorable due to higher miscellaneous maintenance. Professional Service Contracts $8.9M favorable due to true-up for BSC IT allocations and timing of consulting and engineering services. Materials and Supplies $5.8M favorable due to timing of rolling stock maintenance events and usage in MoE as well as a mis-post for capital expense to be corrected next month partially offset by emergency transformer repairs in MoW and material adjustment true ups.
payload.description: Detail of non-labor expense variances through September 2025

tool_args.label: September 2025 Farebox Revenue Summary
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North farebox revenue totaled $58.3 million, which was $2.3 million or 4.1% above the Forecast.

payload.claim_text: Metro-North farebox revenue totaled $58.3 million in September 2025, which was $2.3 million or 4.1% above the Forecast. Variances driven by higher non-commutation ridership and higher average yield per passenger.
payload.description: September 2025 farebox revenue summary

tool_args.label: Preliminary Close Results Subject to Adjustment
tool_args.raw_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the period. Subsequent adjustments are made as actuals become available. Post-Close Adjustments are adjustments made to the preliminary YTD results based on actuals that do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the period. Subsequent adjustments are made as actuals become available. Post-Close Adjustments are adjustments made to the preliminary YTD results based on actuals that do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.
payload.description: Financial results in this report are based on preliminary close and subject to revision with post-close adjustments in subsequent months
